path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\01. Green Greens (Melee).mp3
description: At first listen it might seem plain, but the green greens theme is legendary for good reason. It's got this beautiful chord sequence which makes it sounds mystical and Disney-like. My favourite part is at the end before the loop. That part of the melody just always gets me.
title: Green Greens
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\02. Green Greens (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: I really think they cooked with this one! The huge horns at the start set the tone, then it launches into a Fantasia-style orchestral version of the track. Then it goes into a Rainbow Road-style section before the last part which is a super cool build up with crazy harmony. I just love it.
title: Green Greens
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\03. Kirby Retro Medley.mp3
description: A mix of the whole soundtrack of the first game for the gameboy stage. These tracks are timeless and great.
title: Kirby Retro Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\04. King Dedede's Theme (Brawl).mp3
description: Great music for a great character.
title: King Dedede's Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\05. King Dedede's Theme (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: Wild that they commissioned these two artists to make traditional Japanese versions of this and one other track. It makes for something different for sure! I think it's great.
title: King Dedede's Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\06. Staff Credits - Kirby's Dream Land.mp3
description: This is the remix that immediately caught my attention from Ultimate! Nowadays when I look for a Kirby song to play in tournament I always end up picking this one. It's a lot of fun on its own, but I love it for the amazing bridge when it feels like you're flying through space on one of Kirby's stars.
title: Staff Credits
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\07. Boss Theme Medley - Kirby Series.mp3
description: Super frenetic collection of all the boss themes. I love it because each one is like 20 seconds so they just have them all. It's got Kirby's Adventure, Dream Land 2, Super Star, Crystal Shards, Adventure again and Squeak Squad and they all go into each other so well.
title: Boss Theme Medley
composers: Jun Ishikawa, Hirokazu Ando, Tadashi Ikegami, Shogo Sakai
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\08. Forest Stage.mp3
description: This is a remix of the forest music from Kirby's Adventure (later heard in Nightmare in Dreamland, my first Kirby game). It's goofy, it's fun, it's from Air Ride of all games, and for me it's nostalgic.
title: Forest Stage
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\09. Ice Cream Island.mp3
description: This is the new remix they dropped when the 64 Dreamland stage came to Smash 4 and I like they went for something different. It takes this modern percussion used in lots of these remixes but puts the original chiptune over the top. It's like the original but with extra heft. They throw in the boss theme too, why not. Also shout-outs to Kirby's Adventure, love it.
title: Ice Cream Island
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\10. Butter Building (Brawl).mp3
description: I always loved this one from Brawl. It sounds like music to do aerobics to. It's so silly and fun. Just love it.
title: Butter Building
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\11. Butter Building (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: It's a lot of fun, different and more light and airy than the Brawl remix. It's cool that it has other music from Kirby's Adventure too though, Vegetable Valley and Ice Cream Island.
title: Butter Building
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\12. Gourmet Race (64).mp3
description: Huge classic. How can you say that this music is bad. Whenever I hear it I picture that meme of this song playing over Beyonce's single ladies video.
title: Gourmet Race
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\13. Gourmet Race (Melee).mp3
description: This remix may have revolutionised what it means to remix video game music in general. They took a cheeky song and made it so needlessly epic for the Fountain of Dreams stage. I feel like many remixes have tried to since tried to emulate this glow up but end up sounding generic. This just sounds sooooo good.
title: Gourmet Race
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\14. Gourmet Race (Brawl).mp3
description: A hard rock version of this track. For me, it's too much.
title: Gourmet Race
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\15. The Great Cave Offensive.mp3
description: At first glance this may seem like Green Greens but just know that the track from Super Star is an evolution of Green Greens! Anyway this remix also contains the underground music and this most amazing build up section after that. The harmony! Seriously the bit before the loop is just so great. I love it.
title: The Great Cave Offensive
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\16. Meta Knight's Revenge.mp3
description: A timeless classic that is deeply embedded into the DNA of Brawl. An introduction to the 'cool' side of kirby that isn't all fun and games and also Meta Knight's whole thing. This combined two excellent tracks from Meta Knight's Revenge and no-one could have done it better.
title: Meta Knight's Revenge
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\17. Vs. Marx.mp3
description: I always found it wild that Sakurai made and constantly brought back Marx, a weird as fuck final boss from Super Star with a name like that. Whatever, Kirby is famous for its cosmic horror final bosses and this was one of the original ones. His theme is also weird and I love it. The first part is in 13/8! This also includes this really cool part of Green Greens that I love.
title: Vs. Marx
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\18. Planet Popstar.mp3
description: I think Kirby 64 did let down the team a bit with its soundtrack. A lot of it is hard to listen to it because it's so many sounds playing at once. This one is alright, it could have been way worse.
title: Planet Popstar
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\19. 02 Battle.mp3
description: Huge banger. I can't believe they went so hard with these Brawl remixes! Love the melody just being simple notes moving up and down, and then slowly speeding up. The intense chord sequence is great. Another cosmic horror final bosses excellently represented. Also, a million times better than the original.
title: 02 Battle
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\20. Celestial Valley.mp3
description: A cute and fun track from the Air Ride soundtrack. Love the whistling.
title: Celestial Valley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\21. Frozen Hillside.mp3
description: They added this to Brawl so that Meta Knight had some music for the mountain stage with the Ice Climbers. That happens to be one of my favourite parts of the game because I was obsessed with the Ice Climbers for some reason (I was a child). So hearing this on that stage made me appreciate it for what it is: great, fast-paced, ice level music (rare).
title: Frozen Hillside
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\22. Checker Knights.mp3
description: No idea why they removed this. It's not as good as the other ones from Air Ride though, that's true.
title: Checker Knights
composers: Shogo Sakai, Hirokazu Ando, Jun Ishikawa, Tadashi Ikegami
contributors: Jun Ishikawa, Hirokazu Ando, Shogo Sakai, Tadashi Ikegami
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\23. City Trial.mp3
description: Cool of them to finally put a reference to this in the game, as City Trial shares a lot of DNA with Smash in general. If I'm honest though, this music and remix doesn't speak to me.
title: City Trial
composers: Shogo Sakai, Hirokazu Ando, Jun Ishikawa, Tadashi Ikegami
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\24. The Legendary Air Ride Machine.mp3
description: Didn't realise that this was a remix from Brawl times! Makes sense as this game was Sakurai's baby. I feel like it's quite plain. Could be Dragon Quest or something (derogatory).
title: The Legendary Air Ride Machine
composers: Shogo Sakai, Hirokazu Ando, Jun Ishikawa, Tadashi Ikegami
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\25. Forest-Nature Area.mp3
description: They replaced the original track with an actual remix in Smash 4! It goes for the Metroid - Escape tactic of starting off with the chiptunes then evolving into an orchestral version. For some reason it also includes the music from Mustard Mountain, which doesn't really belong but sure.
title: Forest/Nature Area
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\26. Forest-Nature Area.mp3
description: I liked that this was in the game! I love the Amazing Mirror, it might be the best Kirby game, so it was great to have it just straight in there.
title: Forest/Nature Area
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\27. Squeak Squad Theme.mp3
description: I was always turned off this remix because of the horrible beginning. I've also never played Squeak Squad so it doesn't have that nostalgic weight for me.
title: Squeak Squad Theme
composers: Jun Ishikawa, Hirokazu Ando, Tadashi Ikegami, Shogo Sakai
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\28. The Adventure Begins.mp3
description: Doesn't inspire much inside me.
title: The Adventure Begins
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\29. Through the Forest.mp3
description: This is so fun! A cheeky little melody.
title: Through the Forest
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\30. Sky Tower.mp3
description: Took me a while to realise how good this one is. It sounds like it came from Robobot not this. Great fast pace and cute melody.
title: Sky Tower
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\31. Dangerous Dinner.mp3
description: It's pretty boring.
title: Dangerous Dinner
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\32. CROWNED.mp3
description: Great final boss music from Return to Dream Land. Great track.
title: CROWNED
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\33. Floral Fields.mp3
description: I don't love it. It's nothing special.
title: Floral Fields
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\34. Fatal Blooms in Moonlight.mp3
description: So dramatic and great! Hidden gem for gay players to pick when they need a power-up in tournament.
title: Fatal Blooms in Moonlight
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\35. The World to Win.mp3
description: For a while this was the best music on the Smash 4 Dreamland legal stage so everyone knew it. It's great!
title: The World to Win
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\36. CROWNED - Ver.2.mp3
description: Same track but pretty different vibe. Way more low-key. Not sure if I love it like the other one.
title: CROWNED: Ver.2
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\37. Venturing into the Mechanized World.mp3
description: Nice to have Robobot but I would have loved some of the boss music instead of another level 1 song. It's forgettable.
title: Venturing into the Mechanized World
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\38. Pink Ball Activate!.mp3
description: It's better than the other Robobot song but they could have picked much better ones.
title: Pink Ball Activate!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\39. Kirby Battle Royale - Main Theme.mp3
description: Wow this is so plain.
title: Kirby Battle Royale: Main Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby

filename: 40. A Battle of Friends and Bonds 2.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 08 - Kirby (3DS, GC, N64, Switch, Wii, Wii U) (gamerip) (1999)\40. A Battle of Friends and Bonds 2.mp3
description: Star Allies has some great music and this is genuinely great.
title: A Battle of Friends and Bonds 2
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 08: Kirby
